steps.title: Use the initial balance
steps.content: The initial balance is $35{,}600$, so the model must start with coefficient $35{,}600$. That eliminates the other choices.

steps.title: Read the calculated result
steps.content: After 15 years the account is larger than the initial balance, so the yearly factor must be greater than $1$. A factor of $1.09$ means $9%$ growth each year; a factor of $0.09$ would shrink the account toward $0$.

steps.title: Confirm the model
steps.content: Choice A, $$A(t)=35{,}600(1.09)^t,$$ has the correct initial balance and a growth factor greater than $1$. A is correct.
